# Toast

The old `toast` component is deprecated in current shadcn-vue guidance. Prefer `Sonner` for new notification work.

## When to Use

- Only when maintaining an older codebase that still uses the legacy toast stack

## Status

- Deprecated in favor of `sonner`

## Migration Guidance

- New work should install and document `sonner`
- Existing code should be migrated incrementally rather than expanded further

## Related Components

- `sonner`, `alert`
